zh.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Sturgis於1617年3月22日出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親Thomas Huckins36歲，母親Elizabaeth Hyatt35歲。他於1642年與Elizabeth Hinckley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他於1639年登記服兵役。他去世於1679年11月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼享年62歲，埋葬在亞特 澤亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Sturgis于1617年3月22日出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，他的父亲Thomas Huckins36岁，母亲Elizabaeth Hyatt35岁。他于1642年与Elizabeth Hinckley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他于1639年登记服兵役。他去世于1679年11月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼享年62岁，埋葬在亞特 澤亞。

nameMeanings.name: Sturgis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Turgoose with prosthetic initial S-, ultimately from the Middle English personal name Turgis, a Norman form of Old Norse Thorgils, Thorgisl, with ancient Germanic -gis replacing Old Norse -gisl. The name ultimately derives from the divine name Thórr ‘Thor’ + an element corresponding to ancient Germanic and Old English gisl ‘hostage, pledge’.

History: Edward Sturgis, from Hannington, Northamptonshire, England, settled in Charlestown in 1634 and moved to Yarmouth, MA, in 1638. His descendants included a revolutionary war soldier and Cape Cod shipmaster, and a Massachusetts legislator.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Sturgis was born on 22 March 1617, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, Thomas Huckins, was 36 and his mother, Elizabaeth Hyatt, was 35. He married Elizabeth Hinckley in 1642, in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1639. He died on 29 November 1679, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 62, and was buried in At Sea.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Sturgis est né le 22 mars 1617, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Huckins, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabaeth Hyatt, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hinckley en 1642, à Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1639. Il est décédé le 29 novembre 1679, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à En mer.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Sturgis am 22. März 1617 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Huckins 36 und seine Mutter Elizabaeth Hyatt 35. Er hat 1642 in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Elizabeth Hinckley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1639 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 29. November 1679 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Auf dem Meer begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Sturgis è nato il il 22 marzo 1617 nel London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Thomas Huckins, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabaeth Hyatt, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Hinckley nel 1642, nel Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1639. Morì il 29 novembre 1679, nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a At Sea.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Sturgisが1617年3月22日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Huckinsは36歳，母Elizabaeth Hyattは35歳であった。1642年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルバーンスタブルでElizabeth Hinckleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1639年に兵役登録をした。彼は1679年11月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーで62歳で死去し，アト セアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Sturgis(이)가 1617년 3월 22일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Huckins(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabaeth Hyatt(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1642년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에서 Elizabeth Hinckley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1639년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1679년 11월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 앳 시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Sturgis nasceu em 22 de março de 1617, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Huckins, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabaeth Hyatt, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hinckley em 1642, em Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1639. Ele faleceu em 29 de novembro de 1679, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Em alto mar.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Sturgis родился 22 марта 1617 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Huckins было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabaeth Hyatt, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hinckley в 1642 г. в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. В 1639 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 29 ноября 1679 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности ат сеа.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Sturgis nació el 22 de marzo de 1617, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Huckins, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabaeth Hyatt, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Hinckley en 1642, en Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1639. Murió el 29 de noviembre de 1679, en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en En el mar.
